Functions.Description: Find the average location (centroid) of an array of Actors

Functions.Name: GetAllActorsOfClass
Functions.Description:
Find all Actors in the world of the specified class.
	 	This is a slow operation, use with caution e.g. do not use every frame.

Params.Name: ActorClass
Params.Description: Class of Actor to find. Must be specified or result array will be empty.

Params.Name: OutActors
Params.Description: Output array of Actors of the specified class.

Functions.Name: GetFirstActorOfClass
Functions.Description:
Find one Actor in the world of the specified class.
		This is a slow operation, use with caution e.g. do not use every frame.

Params.Name: ActorClass
Params.Description: Class of Actor to find. Must be specified or result array will be empty.

Functions.Name: GetAllActorsWithInterface
Functions.Description:
Find all Actors in the world with the specified interface.
	 	This is a slow operation, use with caution e.g. do not use every frame.

Params.Name: Interface
Params.Description: Interface to find. Must be specified or result array will be empty.

Params.Name: OutActors
Params.Description: Output array of Actors of the specified interface.

Functions.Description: Create a new player for this game.

Params.Description: The ID of the controller that the should control the newly created player. A value of -1 specifies to use the next available ID

Functions.Name: ApplyRadialDamage
Functions.Description: Hurt locally authoritative actors within the radius. Will only hit components that block the Visibility channel.

Params.Name: BaseDamage
Params.Description: - The base damage to apply, i.e. the damage at the origin.

Params.Name: Origin
Params.Description: - Epicenter of the damage area.

Params.Name: DamageRadius
Params.Description: - Radius of the damage area, from Origin

Params.Name: DamageTypeClass
Params.Description: - Class that describes the damage that was done.

Params.Name: DamageCauser
Params.Description: - Actor that actually caused the damage (e.g. the grenade that exploded). This actor will not be damaged and it will not block damage.

Params.Name: InstigatedByController
Params.Description: - Controller that was responsible for causing this damage (e.g. player who threw the grenade)

Params.Name: DamagePreventionChannel
Params.Description: - Damage will not be applied to victim if there is something between the origin and the victim which blocks traces on this channel

Return.Description: true if damage was applied to at least one actor.

Functions.Name: ApplyRadialDamageWithFalloff
Functions.Description: Hurt locally authoritative actors within the radius. Will only hit components that block the Visibility channel.

Params.Name: BaseDamage
Params.Description: - The base damage to apply, i.e. the damage at the origin.

Params.Name: Origin
Params.Description: - Epicenter of the damage area.

Params.Name: DamageInnerRadius
Params.Description: - Radius of the full damage area, from Origin

Params.Name: DamageOuterRadius
Params.Description: - Radius of the minimum damage area, from Origin

Params.Name: DamageFalloff
Params.Description: - Falloff exponent of damage from DamageInnerRadius to DamageOuterRadius

Params.Name: DamageTypeClass
Params.Description: - Class that describes the damage that was done.

Params.Name: DamageCauser
Params.Description: - Actor that actually caused the damage (e.g. the grenade that exploded)

Params.Name: InstigatedByController
Params.Description: - Controller that was responsible for causing this damage (e.g. player who threw the grenade)

Params.Name: DamagePreventionChannel
Params.Description: - Damage will not be applied to victim if there is something between the origin and the victim which blocks traces on this channel

Return.Description: true if damage was applied to at least one actor.

Functions.Name: ApplyPointDamage
Functions.Description: Hurts the specified actor with the specified impact.

Params.Name: DamagedActor
Params.Description: - Actor that will be damaged.

Params.Name: BaseDamage
Params.Description: - The base damage to apply.

Params.Name: HitFromDirection
Params.Description: - Direction the hit came FROM

Params.Name: HitInfo
Params.Description: - Collision or trace result that describes the hit

Params.Name: EventInstigator
Params.Description: - Controller that was responsible for causing this damage (e.g. player who shot the weapon)

Params.Name: DamageCauser
Params.Description: - Actor that actually caused the damage (e.g. the grenade that exploded)

Params.Name: DamageTypeClass
Params.Description: - Class that describes the damage that was done.

Return.Description: Actual damage the ended up being applied to the actor.

Functions.Name: ApplyDamage
Functions.Description: Hurts the specified actor with generic damage.

Params.Name: DamagedActor
Params.Description: - Actor that will be damaged.

Params.Name: BaseDamage
Params.Description: - The base damage to apply.

Params.Name: EventInstigator
Params.Description: - Controller that was responsible for causing this damage (e.g. player who shot the weapon)

Params.Name: DamageCauser
Params.Description: - Actor that actually caused the damage (e.g. the grenade that exploded)

Params.Name: DamageTypeClass
Params.Description: - Class that describes the damage that was done.

Return.Description: Actual damage the ended up being applied to the actor.

Functions.Name: PlayWorldCameraShake
Functions.Description: Plays an in-world camera shake that affects all nearby local players, with distance-based attenuation. Does not replicate.

Params.Name: WorldContextObject
Params.Description: - Object that we can obtain a world context from

Params.Name: Shake
Params.Description: - Camera shake asset to use

Params.Name: Epicenter
Params.Description: - location to place the effect in world space

Params.Name: InnerRadius
Params.Description: - Cameras inside this radius are ignored

Params.Name: OuterRadius
Params.Description: - Cameras outside of InnerRadius and inside this are effected

Params.Name: Falloff
Params.Description: - Affects falloff of effect as it nears OuterRadius

Params.Name: bOrientShakeTowardsEpicenter
Params.Description: - Changes the rotation of shake to point towards epicenter instead of forward

Functions.Name: SpawnEmitterAtLocation
Functions.Description: Plays the specified effect at the given location and rotation, fire and forget. The system will go away when the effect is complete. Does not replicate.

Params.Name: WorldContextObject
Params.Description: - Object that we can obtain a world context from

Params.Name: EmitterTemplate
Params.Description: - particle system to create

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: - location to place the effect in world space

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: - rotation to place the effect in world space

Params.Name: Scale
Params.Description: - scale to create the effect at

Params.Name: bAutoDestroy
Params.Description: - Whether the component will automatically be destroyed when the particle system completes playing or whether it can be reactivated

Functions.Name: SpawnEmitterAttached
Functions.Description: Plays the specified effect attached to and following the specified component. The system will go away when the effect is complete. Does not replicate.

Params.Name: EmitterTemplate
Params.Description: - particle system to create

Params.Name: AttachPointName
Params.Description: - Optional named point within the AttachComponent to spawn the emitter at

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: - Depending on the value of LocationType this is either a relative offset from the attach componentpoint or an absolute world location that will be translated to a relative offset (if LocationType is KeepWorldPosition).

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: - Depending on the value of LocationType this is either a relative offset from the attach componentpoint or an absolute world rotation that will be translated to a relative offset (if LocationType is KeepWorldPosition).

Params.Name: Scale
Params.Description: - Depending on the value of LocationType this is either a relative scale from the attach component or an absolute world scale that will be translated to a relative scale (if LocationType is KeepWorldPosition).

Params.Name: LocationType
Params.Description: - Specifies whether Location is a relative offset or an absolute world position

Params.Name: bAutoDestroy
Params.Description: - Whether the component will automatically be destroyed when the particle system completes playing or whether it can be reactivated

Functions.Name: AreAnyListenersWithinRange
Functions.Description: Determines if any audio listeners are within range of the specified location

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: The location to potentially play a sound at

Params.Name: MaximumRange
Params.Description: The maximum distance away from Location that a listener can be

Functions.Name: SetGlobalPitchModulation
Functions.Description:
Sets a global pitch modulation scalar that will apply to all non-UI sounds
	
	  Fire and Forget.
	  Not Replicated.

Params.Name: PitchModulation
Params.Description: - A pitch modulation value to globally set.

Params.Name: TimeSec
Params.Description: - A time value to linearly interpolate the global modulation pitch over from it's current value.

Functions.Name: SetGlobalListenerFocusParameters
Functions.Description:
Sets the global listener focus parameters which will scale focus behavior of sounds based on their focus azimuth settings in their attenuation settings.
	
	  Fire and Forget.
	  Not Replicated.

Params.Name: FocusAzimuthScale
Params.Description: - An angle scale value used to scale the azimuth angle that defines where sounds are in-focus.

Params.Name: FocusDistanceScale
Params.Description: - A distance scale value to use for sounds which are in-focus. Values < 1.0 will reduce perceived distance to sounds, values > 1.0 will increase perceived distance to in-focus sounds.

Params.Name: NonFocusDistanceScale
Params.Description: - A distance scale value to use for sounds which are out-of-focus. Values < 1.0 will reduce perceived distance to sounds, values > 1.0 will increase perceived distance to in-focus sounds.

Params.Name: FocusPriorityScale
Params.Description: - A priority scale value (> 0.0) to use for sounds which are in-focus. Values < 1.0 will reduce the priority of in-focus sounds, values > 1.0 will increase the priority of in-focus sounds.

Params.Name: NonFocusPriorityScale
Params.Description: - A priority scale value (> 0.0) to use for sounds which are out-of-focus. Values < 1.0 will reduce the priority of sounds out-of-focus sounds, values > 1.0 will increase the priority of out-of-focus sounds.

Functions.Name: PlaySound2D
Functions.Description:
Plays a sound directly with no attenuation, perfect for UI sounds.
	 
	   Fire and Forget.
	   Not Replicated.

Params.Name: Sound
Params.Description: - Sound to play.

Params.Name: VolumeMultiplier
Params.Description: - Multiplied with the volume to make the sound louder or softer.

Params.Name: PitchMultiplier
Params.Description: - Multiplies the pitch.

Params.Name: StartTime
Params.Description: - How far in to the sound to begin playback at

Params.Name: ConcurrencySettings
Params.Description: - Override concurrency settings package to play sound with

Params.Name: OwningActor
Params.Description: - The actor to use as the "owner" for concurrency settings purposes. Allows PlaySound calls to do a concurrency limit per owner.

Functions.Name: SpawnSound2D
Functions.Description:
Spawns a sound with no attenuation, perfect for UI sounds.
	 
	   Not Replicated.

Params.Name: Sound
Params.Description: - Sound to play.

Params.Name: PitchMultiplier
Params.Description: - Multiplies the pitch.

Params.Name: StartTime
Params.Description: - How far in to the sound to begin playback at

Params.Name: ConcurrencySettings
Params.Description: - Override concurrency settings package to play sound with

Params.Name: bAutoDestroy
Params.Description: - Whether the returned audio component will be automatically cleaned up when the sound finishes (by completing or stopping) or whether it can be reactivated

Return.Description: An audio component to manipulate the spawned sound

Params.Name: bStopWhenAttachedToDestroyed
Params.Description: - Specifies whether the feedback effect should stop playing when the owner of the attach to component is destroyed.

Params.Name: IntensityMultiplier
Params.Description: - Intensity multiplier

Params.Name: StartTime
Params.Description: - How far in to the feedback effect to begin playback at

Params.Name: AttenuationSettings
Params.Description: - Override attenuation settings package to play effect with

Params.Name: bAutoDestroy
Params.Description: - Whether the returned force feedback component will be automatically cleaned up when the feedback patern finishes (by completing or stopping) or whether it can be reactivated

Return.Description: Force Feedback Component to manipulate the playing feedback effect with

Functions.Name: SetSubtitlesEnabled
Functions.Description: Will set subtitles to be enabled or disabled.

Params.Name: bEnabled
Params.Description: will enable subtitle drawing if true, disable if false.

Functions.Name: AreSubtitlesEnabled
Functions.Description: Returns whether or not subtitles are currently enabled.

Return.Description: true if subtitles are enabled.

Functions.Name: SetBaseSoundMix
Functions.Description: Set the sound mix of the audio system for special EQing

Functions.Name: SetSoundMixClassOverride
Functions.Description: Overrides the sound class adjuster in the given sound mix. If the sound class does not exist in the input sound mix, the sound class adjustment will be added to the sound mix.

Params.Name: InSoundMixModifier
Params.Description: The sound mix to modify.

Params.Name: InSoundClass
Params.Description: The sound class to override (or add) in the sound mix.

Params.Name: Volume
Params.Description: The volume scale to set the sound class adjuster to.

Params.Name: Pitch
Params.Description: The pitch scale to set the sound class adjuster to.

Params.Name: FadeInTime
Params.Description: The interpolation time to use to go from the current sound class adjuster values to the new values.

Params.Name: bApplyToChildren
Params.Description: Whether or not to apply this override to the sound class' children or to just the specified sound class.

Functions.Name: ClearSoundMixClassOverride
Functions.Description: Clears the override of the sound class adjuster in the given sound mix. If the override did not exist in the sound mix, this will do nothing.

Params.Name: InSoundMixModifier
Params.Description: The sound mix to modify.

Params.Name: InSoundClass
Params.Description: The sound class to override (or add) in the sound mix.

Params.Name: FadeOutTime
Params.Description: The interpolation time to use to go from the current sound class adjuster override values to the non-override values.

Functions.Name: PushSoundMixModifier
Functions.Description: Push a sound mix modifier onto the audio system

Functions.Name: PopSoundMixModifier
Functions.Description: Pop a sound mix modifier from the audio system

Functions.Name: ClearSoundMixModifiers
Functions.Description: Clear all sound mix modifiers from the audio system

Functions.Name: ActivateReverbEffect
Functions.Description: Activates a Reverb Effect without the need for a volume

Params.Name: ReverbEffect
Params.Description: Reverb Effect to use

Params.Name: TagName
Params.Description: Tag to associate with Reverb Effect

Params.Name: Priority
Params.Description: Priority of the Reverb Effect

Params.Name: Volume
Params.Description: Volume level of Reverb Effect

Params.Name: FadeTime
Params.Description: Time before Reverb Effect is fully active

Functions.Name: DeactivateReverbEffect
Functions.Description: Deactivates a Reverb Effect not applied by a volume

Params.Name: TagName
Params.Description: Tag associated with Reverb Effect to remove

Functions.Name: GetCurrentReverbEffect
Functions.Description: Returns the highest priority reverb settings currently active from any source (volumes or manual setting).

Functions.Name: SpawnDecalAtLocation
Functions.Description: Spawns a decal at the given location and rotation, fire and forget. Does not replicate.

Params.Name: DecalMaterial
Params.Description: - decal's material

Params.Name: DecalSize
Params.Description: - size of decal

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: - location to place the decal in world space

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: - rotation to place the decal in world space

Params.Name: LifeSpan
Params.Description: - destroy decal component after time runs out (0 = infinite)

Functions.Name: SpawnDecalAttached
Functions.Description: Spawns a decal attached to and following the specified component. Does not replicate.

Params.Name: DecalMaterial
Params.Description: - decal's material

Params.Name: DecalSize
Params.Description: - size of decal

Params.Name: AttachPointName
Params.Description: - Optional named point within the AttachComponent to spawn the emitter at

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: - Depending on the value of Location Type this is either a relative offset from the attach componentpoint or an absolute world position that will be translated to a relative offset

Params.Name: Rotation
Params.Description: - Depending on the value of LocationType this is either a relative offset from the attach componentpoint or an absolute world rotation that will be translated to a realative offset

Params.Name: LocationType
Params.Description: - Specifies whether Location is a relative offset or an absolute world position

Params.Name: LifeSpan
Params.Description: - destroy decal component after time runs out (0 = infinite)

Functions.Name: BreakHitResult
Functions.Description: Extracts data from a HitResult.

Params.Name: Hit
Params.Description: The source HitResult.

Params.Name: bBlockingHit
Params.Description: True if there was a blocking hit, false otherwise.

Params.Name: bInitialOverlap
Params.Description: True if the hit started in an initial overlap. In this case some other values should be interpreted differently. Time will be 0, ImpactPoint will equal Location, and normals will be equal and indicate a depenetration vector.

Params.Name: Time
Params.Description: 'Time' of impact along trace direction ranging from [0.0 to 1.0) if there is a hit, indicating time between start and end. Equals 1.0 if there is no hit.

Params.Name: Distance
Params.Description: The distance from the TraceStart to the Location in world space. This value is 0 if there was an initial overlap (trace started inside another colliding object).

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: Location of the hit in world space. If this was a swept shape test, this is the location where we can place the shape in the world where it will not penetrate.

Params.Name: ImpactPoint
Params.Description: Location of the actual contact point of the trace shape with the surface of the hit object. Equal to Location in the case of an initial overlap.

Params.Name: Normal
Params.Description: Normal of the hit in world space, for the object that was swept (e.g. for a sphere trace this points towards the sphere's center). Equal to ImpactNormal for line tests.

Params.Name: ImpactNormal
Params.Description: Normal of the hit in world space, for the object that was hit by the sweep.

Params.Name: PhysMat
Params.Description: Physical material that was hit. Must set bReturnPhysicalMaterial to true in the query params for this to be returned.

Params.Name: HitActor
Params.Description: Actor hit by the trace.

Params.Name: HitComponent
Params.Description: PrimitiveComponent hit by the trace.

Params.Name: HitBoneName
Params.Description: Name of the bone hit (valid only if we hit a skeletal mesh).

Params.Name: HitItem
Params.Description: Primitive-specific data recording which item in the primitive was hit

Params.Name: FaceIndex
Params.Description: If colliding with trimesh or landscape, index of face that was hit.

Functions.Name: MakeHitResult
Functions.Description: Create a HitResult struct

Params.Name: bBlockingHit
Params.Description: True if there was a blocking hit, false otherwise.

Params.Name: bInitialOverlap
Params.Description: True if the hit started in an initial overlap. In this case some other values should be interpreted differently. Time will be 0, ImpactPoint will equal Location, and normals will be equal and indicate a depenetration vector.

Params.Name: Time
Params.Description: 'Time' of impact along trace direction ranging from [0.0 to 1.0) if there is a hit, indicating time between start and end. Equals 1.0 if there is no hit.

Params.Name: Distance
Params.Description: The distance from the TraceStart to the Location in world space. This value is 0 if there was an initial overlap (trace started inside another colliding object).

Params.Name: Location
Params.Description: Location of the hit in world space. If this was a swept shape test, this is the location where we can place the shape in the world where it will not penetrate.

Params.Name: ImpactPoint
Params.Description: Location of the actual contact point of the trace shape with the surface of the hit object. Equal to Location in the case of an initial overlap.

Params.Name: Normal
Params.Description: Normal of the hit in world space, for the object that was swept (e.g. for a sphere trace this points towards the sphere's center). Equal to ImpactNormal for line tests.

Params.Name: ImpactNormal
Params.Description: Normal of the hit in world space, for the object that was hit by the sweep.

Params.Name: PhysMat
Params.Description: Physical material that was hit. Must set bReturnPhysicalMaterial to true in the query params for this to be returned.

Params.Name: HitActor
Params.Description: Actor hit by the trace.

Params.Name: HitComponent
Params.Description: PrimitiveComponent hit by the trace.

Params.Name: HitBoneName
Params.Description: Name of the bone hit (valid only if we hit a skeletal mesh).

Params.Name: HitItem
Params.Description: Primitive-specific data recording which item in the primitive was hit

Params.Name: FaceIndex
Params.Description: If colliding with trimesh or landscape, index of face that was hit.

Functions.Name: GetSurfaceType
Functions.Description:
Returns the EPhysicalSurface type of the given Hit.
	  To edit surface type for your project, use ProjectSettingsPhysicsPhysicalSurface section

Functions.Name: FindCollisionUV
Functions.Description: Try and find the UV for a collision impact. Note this ONLY works if 'Support UV From Hit Results' is enabled in Physics Settings.

Functions.Name: CreateSaveGameObject
Functions.Description: Create a new, empty SaveGame object to set data on and then pass to SaveGameToSlot.

Params.Name: SaveGameClass
Params.Description: Class of SaveGame to create

Return.Description: New SaveGame object to write data to

Functions.Name: CreateSaveGameObjectFromBlueprint
Functions.Description: Create a new, empty SaveGame object to set data on and then pass to SaveGameToSlot.

Params.Name: SaveGameBlueprint
Params.Description: Blueprint of SaveGame to create

Return.Description: New SaveGame object to write data to

Functions.Name: SaveGameToSlot
Functions.Description: Save the contents of the SaveGameObject to a slot.

Params.Name: SaveGameObject
Params.Description: Object that contains data about the save game that we want to write out

Params.Name: SlotName
Params.Description: Name of save game slot to save to.

Params.Name: UserIndex
Params.Description: For some platforms, master user index to identify the user doing the saving.

Return.Description: Whether we successfully saved this information

Functions.Name: DoesSaveGameExist
Functions.Description: See if a save game exists with the specified name.

Params.Name: SlotName
Params.Description: Name of save game slot.

Params.Name: UserIndex
Params.Description: For some platforms, master user index to identify the user doing the saving.

Functions.Name: LoadGameFromSlot
Functions.Description: Load the contents from a given slot.

Params.Name: SlotName
Params.Description: Name of the save game slot to load from.

Params.Name: UserIndex
Params.Description: For some platforms, master user index to identify the user doing the loading.

Return.Description: SaveGameObject	Object containing loaded game state (NULL if load fails)

Functions.Name: LoadGameFromSlotWithSizeLimit
Functions.Description: Load the contents from a given slot.

Params.Name: SlotName
Params.Description: Name of the save game slot to load from.

Params.Name: UserIndex
Params.Description: For some platforms, master user index to identify the user doing the loading.

Params.Name: MaxSerSize
Params.Description: Specify the maxserializesize of archive, just working for fstring.

Return.Description: SaveGameObject	Object containing loaded game state (NULL if load fails)

Functions.Name: DeleteGameInSlot
Functions.Description: Delete a save game in a particular slot.

Params.Name: SlotName
Params.Description: Name of save game slot to delete.

Params.Name: UserIndex
Params.Description: For some platforms, master user index to identify the user doing the deletion.

Return.Description: True if a file was actually able to be deleted. use DoesSaveGameExist to distinguish between delete failures and failure due to file not existing.

Functions.Name: EnableLiveStreaming
Functions.Description:
~ DVRStreaming API 
	
	  Toggle live DVR streaming.

Params.Name: Enable
Params.Description: If true enable streaming, otherwise disable.

Functions.Name: GetPlatformName
Functions.Description:
Returns the string name of the current platform, to perform different behavior based on platform.
	  (Platform names include Windows, Mac, IOS, Android, PS4, XboxOne, HTML5, Linux)

Functions.Name: BlueprintSuggestProjectileVelocity
Functions.Description: Calculates an launch velocity for a projectile to hit a specified point.

Params.Name: TossVelocity
Params.Description: (output) Result launch velocity.

Params.Name: StartLocation
Params.Description: Intended launch location

Params.Name: EndLocation
Params.Description: Desired landing location

Params.Name: LaunchSpeed
Params.Description: Desired launch speed

Params.Name: OverrideGravityZ
Params.Description: Optional gravity override. 0 means "do not override".

Params.Name: TraceOption
Params.Description: Controls whether or not to validate a clear path by tracing along the calculated arc

Params.Name: CollisionRadius
Params.Description: Radius of the projectile (assumed spherical), used when tracing

Params.Name: bFavorHighArc
Params.Description: If true and there are 2 valid solutions, will return the higher arc. If false, will favor the lower arc.

Params.Name: bDrawDebug
Params.Description: When true, a debug arc is drawn (red for an invalid arc, green for a valid arc)

Return.Description: Returns false if there is no valid solution or the valid solutions are blocked.  Returns true otherwise.

Functions.Name: Blueprint_PredictProjectilePath_ByObjectType
Functions.Description:
Predict the arc of a virtual projectile affected by gravity with collision checks along the arc. Returns a list of positions of the simulated arc and the destination reached by the simulation.
	 Returns true if it hit something.

Params.Name: OutHit
Params.Description: Predicted hit result, if the projectile will hit something

Params.Name: OutPathPositions
Params.Description: Predicted projectile path. Ordered series of positions from StartPos to the end. Includes location at point of impact if it hit something.

Params.Name: OutLastTraceDestination
Params.Description: Goal position of the final trace it did. Will not be in the path if there is a hit.

Params.Name: StartPos
Params.Description: First start trace location

Params.Name: LaunchVelocity
Params.Description: Velocity the "virtual projectile" is launched at

Params.Name: bTracePath
Params.Description: Trace along the entire path to look for blocking hits

Params.Name: ProjectileRadius
Params.Description: Radius of the virtual projectile to sweep against the environment

Params.Name: ObjectTypes
Params.Description: ObjectTypes to trace against, if bTracePath is true.

Params.Name: bTraceComplex
Params.Description: Use TraceComplex (trace against triangles not primitives)

Params.Name: ActorsToIgnore
Params.Description: Actors to exclude from the traces

Params.Name: DrawDebugType
Params.Description: Debug type (one-frame, duration, persistent)

Params.Name: DrawDebugTime
Params.Description: Duration of debug lines (only relevant for DrawDebugType::Duration)

Params.Name: SimFrequency
Params.Description: Determines size of each sub-step in the simulation (chopping up MaxSimTime)

Params.Name: MaxSimTime
Params.Description: Maximum simulation time for the virtual projectile.

Params.Name: OverrideGravityZ
Params.Description: Optional override of Gravity (if 0, uses WorldGravityZ)

Return.Description: True if hit something along the path if tracing for collision.

Functions.Name: Blueprint_PredictProjectilePath_ByTraceChannel
Functions.Description:
Predict the arc of a virtual projectile affected by gravity with collision checks along the arc. Returns a list of positions of the simulated arc and the destination reached by the simulation.
	 Returns true if it hit something (if tracing with collision).

Params.Name: OutHit
Params.Description: Predicted hit result, if the projectile will hit something

Params.Name: OutPathPositions
Params.Description: Predicted projectile path. Ordered series of positions from StartPos to the end. Includes location at point of impact if it hit something.

Params.Name: OutLastTraceDestination
Params.Description: Goal position of the final trace it did. Will not be in the path if there is a hit.

Params.Name: StartPos
Params.Description: First start trace location

Params.Name: LaunchVelocity
Params.Description: Velocity the "virtual projectile" is launched at

Params.Name: bTracePath
Params.Description: Trace along the entire path to look for blocking hits

Params.Name: ProjectileRadius
Params.Description: Radius of the virtual projectile to sweep against the environment

Params.Name: TraceChannel
Params.Description: TraceChannel to trace against, if bTracePath is true.

Params.Name: bTraceComplex
Params.Description: Use TraceComplex (trace against triangles not primitives)

Params.Name: ActorsToIgnore
Params.Description: Actors to exclude from the traces

Params.Name: DrawDebugType
Params.Description: Debug type (one-frame, duration, persistent)

Params.Name: DrawDebugTime
Params.Description: Duration of debug lines (only relevant for DrawDebugType::Duration)

Params.Name: SimFrequency
Params.Description: Determines size of each sub-step in the simulation (chopping up MaxSimTime)

Params.Name: MaxSimTime
Params.Description: Maximum simulation time for the virtual projectile.

Params.Name: OverrideGravityZ
Params.Description: Optional override of Gravity (if 0, uses WorldGravityZ)

Return.Description: True if hit something along the path (if tracing with collision).

Functions.Name: Blueprint_PredictProjectilePath_Advanced
Functions.Description:
Predict the arc of a virtual projectile affected by gravity with collision checks along the arc.
	 Returns true if it hit something.

Params.Name: PredictParams
Params.Description: Input params to the trace (start location, velocity, time to simulate, etc).

Params.Name: PredictResult
Params.Description: Output result of the trace (Hit result, array of locationvelocitytimes for each trace step, etc).

Return.Description: True if hit something along the path (if tracing with collision).

Functions.Name: SuggestProjectileVelocity_CustomArc
Functions.Description:
Returns the launch velocity needed for a projectile at rest at StartPos to land on EndPos.
	 Assumes a medium arc (e.g. 45 deg on level ground). Projectile velocity is variable and unconstrained.
	 Does no tracing.

Params.Name: OutLaunchVelocity
Params.Description: Returns the launch velocity required to reach the EndPos

Params.Name: StartPos
Params.Description: Start position of the simulation

Params.Name: EndPos
Params.Description: Desired end location for the simulation

Params.Name: OverrideGravityZ
Params.Description: Optional override of WorldGravityZ

Params.Name: ArcParam
Params.Description: Change height of arc between 0.0-1.0 where 0.5 is the default medium arc

Functions.Name: GetKeyValue

Functions.Name: HasOption

Params.Description: The string containing the options.

Functions.Name: GetIntOption

Params.Description: The string containing the options.

Params.Name: Key
Params.Description: The key to find the value of in Options.

Return.Description: The value associated with Key as an integer if Key found in Options string, otherwise DefaultValue.
